# Tandem Docs (Full Index)

> Exhaustive index for the published docs site at `https://docs.tandem.ac/`.
> This file is for agents that can browse the docs site, not the source repo.

## Home

- / - Docs home and top-level entry point.
- /start-here/ - Recommended entry path for new users.
- /installation/ - Install Tandem and its prerequisites.
- /install-cli-binaries/ - Install the CLI, engine, and TUI binaries.
- /first-run/ - First-run checklist and validation.
- /build-from-source/ - Build from source instructions.

## Core usage

- /control-panel/ - Browser control panel and editable panel app path.
- /tui-guide/ - Terminal UI guide.
- /agents-and-sessions/ - Sessions and execution model.
- /agent-teams/ - Agent-team architecture and behavior.
- /configuration/ - Providers, keys, and system instructions.
- /headless-service/ - Headless engine service mode.
- /channel-integrations/ - Slack, Discord, Telegram, and related integrations.

## Desktop

- /desktop/overview/ - Desktop overview.
- /desktop/first-10-minutes/ - First 10 minutes with Tandem Desktop.
- /desktop/workflows/ - Desktop workflows.
- /desktop/settings-and-safety/ - Desktop settings and safety.
- /desktop/learn-walkthroughs/ - Learn walkthroughs and tutorials.
- /desktop/troubleshooting/ - Desktop troubleshooting.
- /desktop/headless-deployment/ - Headless deployment path from desktop workflows.

## Developer and automation

- /mcp-automated-agents/ - Automated agent workflows and MCP integration.
- /agent-workflow-mission-quickstart/ - Compact checklist for agents creating and operating Tandem workflows or missions.
- /choosing-providers-and-models-for-agents/ - Provider and model selection guide for agents and staged workflows.
- /prompting-workflows-and-missions/ - Prompting guide for workflows, missions, and staged recurring operations.
- /creating-and-running-workflows-and-missions/ - Operational guide for choosing and running workflows, missions, and automations.
- /engine-authentication-for-agents/ - Engine token and authenticated SDK/HTTP usage guide.
- /webmcp-for-agents/ - WebMCP workflow guidance for agents.
- /autonomous-coding-agents-github-projects/ - GitHub Projects coding-agent workflows.
- /browser-setup-and-testing/ - Browser install, setup, and validation.

## Architecture and reference

- /architecture/ - Internal architecture overview.
- /protocol-matrix/ - Protocol compatibility matrix.
- /engine-testing/ - Engine testing guidance.
- /reference/engine-commands/ - Engine CLI reference.
- /reference/tui-commands/ - TUI command reference.
- /reference/tools/ - Tool API reference.
- /reference/spawn-policy/ - Spawn policy and safety rules.
- /reference/agent-team-api/ - Agent-team HTTP API.
- /reference/agent-team-events/ - Agent-team event stream contract.

## SDKs

- /sdk/ - SDK landing page.
- /sdk/typescript/ - TypeScript SDK.
- /sdk/python/ - Python SDK.
- /sdk/scheduling-automations/ - SDK automation scheduling.

## Design and support

- /design-system/ - Product and UI design guidance.

## Navigation cues

- If the agent needs to understand what Tandem is, start at `/`.
- If it needs user onboarding, go to `/start-here/`, then follow `/installation/` and `/first-run/`.
- If it needs to operate Tandem, use `/control-panel/`, `/headless-service/`, and `/tui-guide/`.
- If it needs to reason about agents, use `/agents-and-sessions/` and `/agent-teams/`.
- If it needs integration guidance, use `/mcp-automated-agents/`, `/webmcp-for-agents/`, and the SDK pages.
- If it needs the shortest actionable checklist, use `/agent-workflow-mission-quickstart/`.
- If it needs provider or model policy guidance, use `/choosing-providers-and-models-for-agents/`.
- If it needs to generate a mission or workflow from human intent, use `/prompting-workflows-and-missions/`.
- If it needs to choose the correct runtime path, use `/creating-and-running-workflows-and-missions/`.
- If it needs engine auth or token handling, use `/engine-authentication-for-agents/`.
- If it needs implementation details, use the `/reference/` pages plus `/protocol-matrix/` and `/architecture/`.

## External

- https://github.com/frumu-ai/tandem
- https://webmcp.dev/
